onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 04/09/2024
		Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9_ ]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar

	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9_ ]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/04/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values. 
	"""
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	#headerLabel = "Add"
	#messageType = 'plantPanel'
	#payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'UnitName':'','UnitDescription':'','UnitLabelTo':-1,'WorkStationType':-1,'IPAddress':'','AttachedTo': -1,'WorkStationTypeId':-1,'LineTypeID':-1,'PlantCode':'','PlantAddress':''}		 			
	#system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/04/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update plant configuration values into db . 
	"""
	import re
	try:
		UnitId = self.view.custom.UnitId
		system.perspective.print(UnitId)
		headerLabel = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text
		UnitName = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntUnitName").getChild("txt").props.text
		UnitDesc = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntUnitDesciption").getChild("txt").props.text
		UnitLevel = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntUnitLevel").getChild("drpUnitLevel").props.value
		AttachedTo = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAttachedTo").getChild("drpAttachedTo").props.value
		IsActive = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value
		WorkStationType = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStationType").getChild("drpWorkStationType").props.value
		IPaddress = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntWorkStationType").getChild("txt").props.text
		Linetype = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLineType").getChild("drpUnitLevel").props.value
		PlantID = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAttachedTo").custom.PlantID
		LineID = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAttachedTo").custom.LineID
		AreaID = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAttachedTo").custom.AreaID
		PlantCode=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntPlantDetails").getChild("txt").props.text
		PlantAddress=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntPlantDetails").getChild("txt_1").props.text
#		system.perspective.print("Add Values:%s"%(Header,UnitName,UnitDesc,UnitLevel,AttachedTo,IsActive,WorkStationType,IPaddress))
		CurrentUserId=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		next = 0
		AllDataCount = 0
		self.session.custom.IPaddress = IPaddress
		if(UnitName != ''and UnitLevel > 0  and IsActive != -1):
			if(len(UnitName)>=2 and len(UnitName)<=50):
				#system.perspective.print(UnitName)
				#system.perspective.print(UnitLevel)
				#system.perspective.print(IsActive)
				next = 1
				params = {"Level":int(UnitLevel)}
				AllData = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Plant/CheckUnitNameAlreadyExist",params)
				#system.perspective.print(AllData)
				PyAllData=system.dataset.toPyDataSet(AllData)
				#AllDataCount = 0
				for row in PyAllData:
					name = row[1]
					if name == UnitName and UnitId!=row[0]:
						AllDataCount = 1
						
						break
					#else :
						#AllDataCount = 0
				#system.perspective.print(AllDataCount)
				
				if(AllDataCount==0):
					next=1
				else :
					next = 0
				if(UnitLevel == 2 and next == 1):
					next=0
					if(IPaddress != ''):
						if(re.match(r'^\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+$',IPaddress)):
							regex = [0<=int(x)<256 for x in re.split('\.',re.match(r'^\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+$',IPaddress).group(0))].count(True)
						else:
							regex = 0
						if(int(regex) == 4):
							next = 1
						else:
							next = 0
							state = 'warning'
							message = 'IP address should be in proper format, E.g.= 0.0.0.0 to 255.255.255.255'
					else:
						state = 'error'
						message = 'Fields mark with (*) are required.'
				elif (next == 0):
					#system.perspective.print("loop1")
					next=0
					state = 'error'
					message = 'Unit name already present.'
			else:
				next=0
				state = 'error'
				message = 'Unit name length should be between 2 to 50 characters.'
			if len(UnitDesc)>100:
				next=0
				state = 'error'
				message = 'Unit description should be maximum 100 digits.'
		
		#system.perspective.print(next)
		if(next ==1):
			#system.perspective.print("loop2")
			if IPaddress=='':
				IPaddress=None
			if(str(headerLabel) == 'Add'):
				Id=0
				if(str(UnitDesc) == ' '):
					UnitDesc = ''
				
				params = {"UnitName":UnitName,"Description":UnitDesc,"Level":UnitLevel,"AttachedTo":AttachedTo,"CreatedBy":CurrentUserId,"IPAddress":IPaddress,"WorkStationTypeId":WorkStationType,"lineid":LineID,"areaid":AreaID,"plantid":PlantID,"linetypeid":Linetype,"plantcode":PlantCode,"plantaddress":PlantAddress}
				#print params
				#system.perspective.print(params)
				result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Plant/Insert_Plant",params)
				
				if(int(result) > 0):	
					state = 'success'
					message = "Record added successfully."
					auditMsg=str(UnitName)+message
				else:
					state = 'error'
					message = "Record not added. Please contact system administrator."
			elif(str(headerLabel) == 'Edit'):
				Id=self.view.custom.UnitId
				if(str(UnitDesc) == ' '):
					UnitDesc = ''
				params = {"UnitName":UnitName,"Description":UnitDesc,"UnitId":UnitId,"LevelId":UnitLevel,"AttachedTo":AttachedTo,"IsActive":IsActive,"IPAddress":IPaddress,"ModifiedBy":CurrentUserId,'WorkStationTypeId':WorkStationType,"lineid":LineID,"areaid":AreaID,"plantid":PlantID,"linetypeid":Linetype,"plantcode":PlantCode,"plantaddress":PlantAddress}
				#system.perspective.print("Update Values:%s"%params)
				result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Plant/Update_Plant",params)
				if(int(result) > 0):		
					state = 'success'
					message = "Record updated successfully."
					auditMsg=str(UnitName)+message
				else:
					state = 'error'
					message = "Record not updated. Please contact system administrator."
					
        		if(str(result) > '0'):
				headerLabel = "Add"
				messageType = 'equipPanel'   				
				payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'id':'','name':'','desc':'','level':int(-1),'attached':int(-1),'isActive':int(1),'deviceType':int(-1),'ipAddress':'','asset':'','attachedWorkStationId':int(-1),'isDualWorkStationEnabled':int(1),'lineTypeId':-1,'plcIndex':-1,'isDualWorkStation':-1}		 			
				system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
				system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
				messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
				system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
				messageType = 'tableRefresh1'
				system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
				system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
				system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
				system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		#addToAuditLogStrat
		system.perspective.print(auditMsg)
		category='Adminstration'
		subCategory='Plant Configuration'
		if(Id!=0):
			prevDesc=self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload
			system.perspective.print("Printing prevDesc--------->")
			curDesc = {'UnitName':UnitName,'UnitDescription':UnitDesc,'UnitLevel':UnitLevel,'AttachedTo':int(AttachedTo),'isActive':int(IsActive),'IPAddress':IPaddress,'PlantAddress':PlantAddress,'Plant Code':PlantCode,'LineTypeID':Linetype}
			system.perspective.print(prevDesc)
			#system.perspective.print(curDesc)
			description=str(auditMsg)+"Where ID="+str(Id)+" With Previous Data->"+str(prevDesc)+" and Updated Data->"+str(curDesc)
		else:
			description=str(auditMsg)
		createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddAuditLogs(category, subCategory, description, createdBy)
		#addAuditLogEnd
		
	except:
		screenName ='Plant Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/PlantConfigurationPannel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()  
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
		# implement your handler here
		load=payload.copy()
		#system.perspective.print("Printing payload of msg handler----------->")
		#system.perspective.print(payload)
		load.pop('headerLabel')
		load.pop('UnitId')
		load.pop('WorkStationTypeId')
		#system.perspective.print("msg handler1----------->")
		import json
		load_json = json.dumps(load)
		self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload=load_json
		#system.perspective.print("msg handler2----------->")
		#system.perspective.print("payload msghandler3------------->")
		#system.perspective.print(self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload)

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/04/2024
		Purpose: Insert row data into panel fields. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text = payload['headerLabel']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntUnitName").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['UnitName']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntUnitDesciption").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['UnitDescription']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntUnitLevel").getChild("drpUnitLevel").props.value = payload['UnitLevel']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntWorkStationType").getChild("drpWorkStationType").props.value = payload['WorkStationTypeId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntWorkStationType").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['IPAddress']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAttachedTo").getChild("drpAttachedTo").props.value = payload['AttachedTo']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value = payload['isActive']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntWorkStationType").getChild("drpWorkStationType").props.value = payload['WorkStationTypeId']
	self.view.custom.UnitId = payload['UnitId']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLineType").getChild("drpUnitLevel").props.value=payload['LineTypeID']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPlantDetails").getChild("txt").props.text=payload['PlantCode']
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPlantDetails").getChild("txt_1").props.text=payload['PlantAddress']
